targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_alarm_state AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id, code)
        device_id,
        code,
        type,
        severity
    FROM dbt.int_events_alarms
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    ORDER BY device_id, code, timestamp DESC
),
active_high_alarms AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT device_id
    FROM latest_alarm_state
    WHERE severity = 'high'
      AND type = 'alarm'
)
SELECT 
    d.id as device_id,
    d.device_name,
    d.cabin,
    dt.name as device_type,
    pp.id as power_plant_id,
    pp.name as power_plant_name,
    CASE WHEN aha.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as has_active_alarm
FROM public.tb_devices d
INNER JOIN public.tb_devices_type dt ON d.device_type_id = dt.id
INNER JOIN public.tb_power_plants pp ON d.power_plant_id = pp.id
LEFT JOIN active_high_alarms aha ON aha.device_id = d.id
WHERE d.id = ${device_id}
  AND d.power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}

WITH device_info AS (
    SELECT 
        d.id as device_id,
        d.device_name,
        d.cabin,
        dt.name as device_type,
        dt.description as device_type_description,
        d.power_plant_id,
        pp.name as power_plant_name,
        pp.location as power_plant_location,
        d.is_active
    FROM public.tb_devices d
    INNER JOIN public.tb_devices_type dt ON d.device_type_id = dt.id
    INNER JOIN public.tb_power_plants pp ON d.power_plant_id = pp.id
    WHERE d.id = ${device_id}
      AND d.power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
),
latest_readings AS (
    -- INVERTER readings
    SELECT 
        ir.field_name as metric,
        ir.value_formatted as value,
        to_char(ir.timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') as last_update,
        ir.display_order
    FROM dbt.int_inverter_latest_readings ir
    WHERE ir.device_id = ${device_id}
      AND ir.power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- RELAY readings
    SELECT 
        'Active Power' as metric,
        ROUND(active_power::numeric, 2)::text || ' kW' as value,
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') as last_update,
        1 as display_order
    FROM dbt.int_relay_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'Line Voltage AB',
        ROUND(line_voltage_ab::numeric, 2)::text || ' V',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        2
    FROM dbt.int_relay_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'Line Voltage BC',
        ROUND(line_voltage_bc::numeric, 2)::text || ' V',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        3
    FROM dbt.int_relay_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'Line Voltage CA',
        ROUND(line_voltage_ca::numeric, 2)::text || ' V',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        4
    FROM dbt.int_relay_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'Current Phase A',
        ROUND(current_phase_a::numeric, 2)::text || ' A',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        5
    FROM dbt.int_relay_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'Current Phase B',
        ROUND(current_phase_b::numeric, 2)::text || ' A',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        6
    FROM dbt.int_relay_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'Current Phase C',
        ROUND(current_phase_c::numeric, 2)::text || ' A',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        7
    FROM dbt.int_relay_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- LOGGER readings
    SELECT 
        'Active Power',
        ROUND(active_power::numeric, 2)::text || ' kW',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        1
    FROM dbt.int_logger_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'Daily Active Energy',
        ROUND(daily_active_energy::numeric, 2)::text || ' kWh',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        2
    FROM dbt.int_logger_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'Cumulative Active Energy',
        ROUND(cumulative_active_energy::numeric, 2)::text || ' kWh',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        3
    FROM dbt.int_logger_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'Efficiency',
        ROUND(efficiency::numeric, 2)::text || ' %',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        4
    FROM dbt.int_logger_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'Inverters Producing',
        inverters_producing_count::text,
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        5
    FROM dbt.int_logger_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- WEATHER STATION readings
    SELECT 
        'Irradiance GHI',
        ROUND(irradiance_ghi::numeric, 2)::text || ' W/m²',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        1
    FROM dbt.int_weather_station_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'Irradiance POA',
        ROUND(irradiance_poa::numeric, 2)::text || ' W/m²',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        2
    FROM dbt.int_weather_station_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'Air Temperature',
        ROUND(air_temperature::numeric, 2)::text || ' °C',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        3
    FROM dbt.int_weather_station_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'Module Temperature',
        ROUND(module_temperature::numeric, 2)::text || ' °C',
        to_char(timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),
        4
    FROM dbt.int_weather_station_latest_readings
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
)
-- Resultado: Tabela simples com 3 colunas
SELECT 
    metric,
    value,
    last_update
FROM latest_readings
ORDER BY display_order;

WITH latest_alarms AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id, code)
    timestamp,
    power_plant_id,
    power_plant_name,
    device_id,
    device_name,
    code,
    value AS code_value,
    description,
    severity,
    type
  FROM dbt.int_events_alarms
  WHERE power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    AND device_id = ${device_id}
  ORDER BY
    device_id,
    code,
    timestamp DESC
)
SELECT
  
  la.description,
  la.severity,
  la.type,
  to_char(la.timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS date_time
FROM latest_alarms la
ORDER BY
  CASE 
    WHEN la.severity = 'high' AND la.code_value = 1 THEN 0
    ELSE 1
  END,
  CASE la.severity
    WHEN 'high' THEN 1
    WHEN 'medium' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  la.timestamp DESC
LIMIT 300;

options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_alarm_state AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id, code)
        device_id,
        code,
        type,
        severity
    FROM dbt.int_events_alarms
    WHERE device_id = ${device_id}
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
    ORDER BY device_id, code, timestamp DESC
),
active_high_alarms AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT device_id
    FROM latest_alarm_state
    WHERE severity = 'high'
      AND type = 'alarm'
),
inverter_data AS (
    SELECT
        s.device_id,
        s.power_plant_id,
        s.device_name,
        s.string_number,
        s.string_current,
        CASE WHEN aha.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as has_active_alarm,
        s.timestamp,
        1 as device_type_id,
        (SELECT ROUND(value_numeric, 2) 
         FROM dbt.int_inverter_latest_readings r 
         WHERE r.device_id = s.device_id AND r.field_name = 'Active Power'
         LIMIT 1) AS active_power_kw,
        (SELECT ROUND(value_numeric, 1) 
         FROM dbt.int_inverter_latest_readings r 
         WHERE r.device_id = s.device_id AND r.field_name = 'Voltage: AB line'
         LIMIT 1) AS voltage_ab,
        (SELECT ROUND(value_numeric, 2) 
         FROM dbt.int_inverter_latest_readings r 
         WHERE r.device_id = s.device_id AND r.field_name = 'Frequency'
         LIMIT 1) AS frequency,
        NULL::integer as associated_inverter_id,
        NULL::text as associated_inverter_name,
        NULL::numeric as associated_inverter_power
    FROM dbt.stg_inverter_string_data s
    LEFT JOIN active_high_alarms aha ON aha.device_id = s.device_id
    WHERE s.power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
      AND s.device_id = ${device_id}
),
relay_data AS (
    SELECT
        d.id as device_id,
        d.power_plant_id,
        d.device_name,
        NULL::integer as string_number,
        NULL::numeric as string_current,
        CASE WHEN aha.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as has_active_alarm,
        r.timestamp,
        2 as device_type_id,
        ROUND(r.active_power::numeric, 2) as active_power_kw,
        ROUND(r.line_voltage_ab::numeric, 1) as voltage_ab,
        NULL::numeric as frequency,
        NULL::integer as associated_inverter_id,
        NULL::text as associated_inverter_name,
        NULL::numeric as associated_inverter_power
    FROM public.tb_devices d
    LEFT JOIN active_high_alarms aha ON aha.device_id = d.id
    LEFT JOIN dbt.int_relay_latest_readings r ON r.device_id = d.id
    WHERE d.power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
      AND d.id = ${device_id}
      AND d.device_type_id = 2
),
logger_data AS (
    SELECT
        logger.id as device_id,
        logger.power_plant_id,
        logger.device_name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY inv.id) as string_number,
        NULL::numeric as string_current,
        CASE WHEN aha.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as has_active_alarm,
        lr.timestamp,
        3 as device_type_id,
        ROUND(lr.active_power::numeric, 2) as active_power_kw,
        ROUND(lr.line_voltage_ab::numeric, 1) as voltage_ab,
        NULL::numeric as frequency,
        inv.id as associated_inverter_id,
        inv.device_name as associated_inverter_name,
        COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(value_numeric, 2) 
         FROM dbt.int_inverter_latest_readings ir 
         WHERE ir.device_id = inv.id AND ir.field_name = 'Active Power'
         LIMIT 1), 0) as associated_inverter_power
    FROM public.tb_devices logger
    LEFT JOIN active_high_alarms aha ON aha.device_id = logger.id
    LEFT JOIN dbt.int_logger_latest_readings lr ON lr.device_id = logger.id
    LEFT JOIN public.tb_devices inv ON inv.power_plant_id = logger.power_plant_id 
        AND inv.cabin = logger.cabin 
        AND inv.device_type_id = 1
        AND inv.is_active = true
    WHERE logger.power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
      AND logger.id = ${device_id}
      AND logger.device_type_id = 3
)
SELECT * FROM inverter_data
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM relay_data
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM logger_data
ORDER BY device_id, string_number NULLS LAST

list.description: Base URL for device command API (Admin only)
list.label: API Endpoint
list.name: api_endpoint

list.description: Authentication token for command API (X-Command-Token header)
list.label: Command Token
list.name: command_token

list.definition:
SELECT
  name AS __text,
  id   AS __value
FROM public.tb_power_plants
ORDER BY name;
list.name: power_plant_id
list.query:
SELECT
  name AS __text,
  id   AS __value
FROM public.tb_power_plants
ORDER BY name;

list.definition:
SELECT 
    d.device_name || ' (' || dt.name || ')' as __text,
    d.id as __value
FROM public.tb_devices d
INNER JOIN public.tb_devices_type dt ON d.device_type_id = dt.id
WHERE d.power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
  AND d.is_active = true
ORDER BY 
    dt.id,
    d.device_name;
list.name: device_id
list.query:
SELECT 
    d.device_name || ' (' || dt.name || ')' as __text,
    d.id as __value
FROM public.tb_devices d
INNER JOIN public.tb_devices_type dt ON d.device_type_id = dt.id
WHERE d.power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}
  AND d.is_active = true
ORDER BY 
    dt.id,
    d.device_name;
